category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line client tool for Cloud189 web disk; official GitHub README identifies it as a Tianyi Cloud Disk CLI client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cloudpan189-go; official GitHub repository uses cloudpan189-go.
docs_sources: Official tickstep GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for cloudpan189-go.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports Cloud189 web disk and command-line client tags; source_facts.name supports Go implementation naming.
